---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected and in what scenario?

## Proposed solution
Describe what you'd like to see. Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought about, and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional context
Anything else that would help — links, examples, related issues.
